name: angular-advanced-table
description: Workspace for the ng-advanced-table Angular libraries and showcase application.

scripts.build:packages: ng build ng-advanced-table && ng build ng-advanced-table-ui && ng build ng-advanced-table-utils
scripts.test:packages: ng test ng-advanced-table --watch=false && ng test ng-advanced-table-ui --watch=false && ng test ng-advanced-table-utils --watch=false
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm pack --dry-run ./dist/ng-advanced-table && npm pack --dry-run ./dist/ng-advanced-table-ui && npm pack --dry-run ./dist/ng-advanced-table-utils
scripts.verify: npm run test:packages && npm run build:packages && npm run build:showcase && npm run pack:dry-run
